body:
It should support --enter, --close, --list in the same style as sh script does.

After we have that script in codebase, we can update README.md to indicate how to use it, instead of containing sh script itself, so sh script will be replaced with our new command.

--list and --close, should reuse logic, of it it listed, we are sure it will be closed, so dangerous close operation can be debugged using safe list operation, but we need to guarantee all enter, close and list use the same matching function, so if we see it in list we will be sure it will also work with enter and close.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).
title: Convert `Script for managing screens` management sh script into JavaScript command, that comes with hive-mind package as `hive-screens`
